self_description: Nestled in the Sierra Nevada mountain town of Truckee, CA, Squeeze In first opened its doors in 1974. At just 10 feet wide and 62 feet long, guests literally have to 'squeeze in' to enjoy the cozy breakfast nook that offers 'the best omelettes on the planet' alongside boozy mimosas, eclectic decor, and unforgettable charm.
